ask.description: Read-only Q&A agent for repository, features, and technical explanations

build.description: Default implementation agent with full build authority

plan.description: Read-first planning and risk analysis agent

ask-repo.description: Ask read-only questions about repo, features, and technical details
ask-repo.template: Answer the following repository question using available project context and files. Keep the response read-only and do not propose or perform code changes. Question: $ARGUMENTS

context-show.template: Read contexts/active.md and summarize the active context, key conventions, risk checklist, and expected command matrix.

context-use.template:
Switch context to: $ARGUMENTS
Update contexts/active.md accordingly and keep the same format. Allowed profiles: general, backend, mobile, web, terraform-azure.

plan-task.description: Generate implementation plan for any coding task
plan-task.template:
@planner Use contexts/active.md as the source of truth for context behavior. Plan task: $ARGUMENTS
Return scope, value, impacted files/packages, API or schema impact, test strategy, rollout risks, and phased tasks. Then hand the plan to @plan-reviewer for a final critical review and return the revised final plan with remaining risks.

debug-task.description: Triage and root-cause any coding issue
debug-task.template:
@debugger Use contexts/active.md as the source of truth for context behavior. Debug task: $ARGUMENTS
Return probable root causes, repro steps, missing diagnostics, likely files, and fix options ranked by confidence.

plan-feature.template:
@planner Use contexts/active.md as the source of truth for context behavior. Plan feature: $ARGUMENTS
Return scope, value, impacted files/packages, API or schema impact, test strategy, rollout risks, and phased tasks. Then hand the plan to @plan-reviewer for a final critical review and return the revised final plan with remaining risks.

review-plan.description: Final critical review of a draft plan
review-plan.template:
@plan-reviewer Use contexts/active.md as the source of truth for context behavior. Review this draft plan: $ARGUMENTS
Return readiness verdict, missing assumptions/dependencies, risk and validation gaps, and a corrected execution-ready plan.

debug-bug.template:
@debugger Use contexts/active.md as the source of truth for context behavior. Debug bug: $ARGUMENTS
Return probable root causes, repro steps, missing diagnostics, likely files, and fix options ranked by confidence.

build-check.template: Read contexts/active.md and run the recommended check commands for the active profile. Summarize pass/fail status and actionable fixes.

release-check.template: @release Use contexts/active.md as the source of truth for release behavior. Run release readiness checks for the active profile and report blockers first.
